# Northwood Landscape Co.

## About
Third-generation landscaping company based in Barrie, Ontario, serving Simcoe County since 1962.

## Services
- Landscape Design & Installation
- Hardscape & Stonework
- Seasonal Maintenance
- Water Features & Drainage
- Snow Removal & Winter Care

## Contact
Phone: (705) 555-0173
Email: info@northwoodlandscape.ca
Location: Barrie, Ontario
Website: https://northwoodlandscape.ca
